DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_AUDIENCE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_AUDIENCE]
( 
	[AudienceID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[AccountID] [nvarchar](16)  NULL,
	[AudienceName] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[TargetingAgeMin] [int]  NULL,
	[TargetingAgeMax] [int]  NULL,
	[ApproximateCountLowerBound] [bigint]  NULL,
	[ApproximateCountUpperBound] [bigint]  NULL,
	[RunStatus] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[TargetingTargetingOptimization] [nvarchar](16)  NULL,
	[TimeCreated] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[TimeUpdated] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[PermissionForActionsCanEdit] [bit]  NULL,
	[PermissionForActionsCanSeeInsight] [bit]  NULL,
	[PermissionForActionsCanShare] [bit]  NULL,
	[PermissionForActionsSubtypeSupportsLookAlike] [bit]  NULL,
	[PermissionForActionsSupportsRecipientLookAlike] [bit]  NULL,
	[SentenceLines] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingExcludedConnections] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingExcludedCustomAudiences] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingExcludedGeoLocationsLocationTypes] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingExcludedGeoLocationsRegions] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingExclusionsInterests] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingFlexibleSpec] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingGenders] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingInterests] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingLocales] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingGeoLocationsCountries] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingGeoLocationsCustomLocations] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TargetingGeoLocationsLocationTypes] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
